team_name: TenderLens AI: Explainable AI Platform for Automated Tender Evaluation & Eligibility Analysis
summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tender documents, evaluate eligibility of bidders, produce explainable evaluation reports, and ensure transparency in decision-making for government procurement.
optimization_claims: Reduces evaluation time from days to minutes
constraints_addressed: Manual evaluation is slow, inconsistent, and difficult to audit
Decisions must be explainable and verifiable in a government context
